narrative: AI Engineer with seven years of experience at Google, a leading product‑first company. The main factor placing him at #24 is a below‑average match to the Search & Retrieval requirements. He brings solid expertise in Learning to Rank, BM25, and deep‑learning models, and has hands‑on experience with Qdrant and PEFT—both directly relevant to building modern vector‑search pipelines. His experience level aligns perfectly with the 5‑9 year band, but his current base in Kochi reduces immediate availability for the Pune/Noida hub. A minor trust flag suggests some uncertainty in profile verification, which should be clarified in the interview.
